title: Gleaming Turkish Wheat Salad
description: A malty, tender salad that evokes nostalgic Turkish flavors, brightened by a citrusy lemon dressing and a gentle fold of fresh herbs.
instructions: Rinse the bulgur wheat under cold water until the water runs clear.
In a medium saucepan, bring 1 cup of water to a boil and add the bulgur, reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 10 minutes until tender.
Remove from heat, fluff the grains with a fork, and transfer to a large bowl while still warm.
Stir in the diced cucumber, tomato, and chopped red onion, mixing gently.
Whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, salt, pepper, and dried mint until emulsified, then pour over the salad.
Fold the dressing into the grains and vegetables until evenly coated.
Sprinkle chopped fresh parsley over the top and give one final gentle toss.
Let the salad rest on a slate tile for 5 minutes before serving to allow flavors to meld.
